data.html:
module.exports = {
  apps: [
    {
      name: "qdrant",
      script: "qdrant",
      args: "--storage-path ~/.qdrant_storage",
      interpreter: "none",
      autorestart: true,
      max_restarts: 10,
      restart_delay: 3000,
      error_file: "/home/jahanzaib/.pm2/logs/qdrant-error.log",
      out_file: "/home/jahanzaib/.pm2/logs/qdrant-out.log",
      log_date_format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z",
      merge_logs: true,
    },
    {
      name: "mcp-sse",
      script: "/home/jahanzaib/mcp-system/bridge/mcp_sse.py",
      interpreter: "python3",
      autorestart: true,
      max_restarts: 10,
      restart_delay: 3000,
      error_file: "/home/jahanzaib/.pm2/logs/mcp-sse-error.log",
      out_file: "/home/jahanzaib/.pm2/logs/mcp-sse-out.log",
      log_date_format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z",
      merge_logs: true,
    },
    {
      name: "mcp-gateway-docker",
      script: "docker",
      args: "compose -f /home/jahanzaib/mcp-system/docker-compose.yml up",
      cwd: "/home/jahanzaib/mcp-system",
      autorestart: false,
      restart_delay: 10000,
      max_restarts: 3,
      env: {
        COMPOSE_FILE: "/home/jahanzaib/mcp-system/docker-compose.yml",
      },
      error_file: "/home/jahanzaib/.pm2/logs/mcp-gateway-docker-error.log",
      out_file: "/home/jahanzaib/.pm2/logs/mcp-gateway-docker-out.log",
      log_date_format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z",
      merge_logs: true,
    },
    {
      name: "ai-lab-dashboard",
      script: "/home/jahanzaib/ai-lab-dashboard/start.sh",
      interpreter: "bash",
      autorestart: true,
      max_restarts: 10,
      restart_delay: 3000,
      error_file: "/home/jahanzaib/.pm2/logs/ai-lab-dashboard-error.log",
      out_file: "/home/jahanzaib/.pm2/logs/ai-lab-dashboard-out.log",
      log_date_format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z",
      merge_logs: true,
    },
  ],
};
